widgets_values:
ℹ️ S-15 LUT Import — apply a portable Adobe Cube 1.0 .cube file to any image

Chain: LoadImage → N-14 JHPixelProLUTImport (filename="pack_lut.cube", strength=0.8) → PreviewImage.

N-14 reads the .cube from ComfyUI's input/ directory (relative filename) or an absolute path, parses the 3D LUT into a tensor grid, and applies it via trilinear grid_sample. Works with any Adobe Cube 1.0 file — DaVinci Resolve exports, Premiere creative-look LUTs, Film Convert / IWLTBAP / Lutify.me / etc.

ROUND-TRIP DEMO: Run the S-14 workflow to export your ComfyUI color-grade chain as pack_lut.cube → copy the file from output/ to input/ → run this workflow to re-apply the grade on a fresh source image. The LUT is portable beyond ComfyUI.

TUNABLES: strength in [0, 1] (0 = pass-through, 1 = full LUT, linear blend); optional MASK input gates the apply spatially (useful with S-05 Luminosity Masking or a face/skin segmentation mask).

LIMITATIONS: trilinear interpolation (tetrahedral deferred v2); RGB-only (no alpha LUT); domain clamp (out-of-range colors held at boundary, no extrapolation).
